## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SmithAI's template implementation progress, marketing efforts, and AI industry trends.](https://fathom.video/share/z7GtyRur9MbVyzKzSynRXE67g2NLEzqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Template design approved; next steps include plagiarism check, branding, and uploading to Smith.ai/documents](https://fathom.video/share/z7GtyRur9MbVyzKzSynRXE67g2NLEzqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Business adoption of AI is increasing, particularly in previously resistant industries (legal, home services)](https://fathom.video/share/z7GtyRur9MbVyzKzSynRXE67g2NLEzqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Smith.ai considering creating neutral, data-driven content on AI's impact on employment and industries](https://fathom.video/share/z7GtyRur9MbVyzKzSynRXE67g2NLEzqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

## Topics

### Template Implementation Progress

      - [Add Smith.ai branding](https://fathom.video/share/z7GtyRur9MbVyzKzSynRXE67g2NLEzqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
